focus: Deepen F-A3-01: downstream-consumer impact of reciprocal-contradictory edge pairs (A contradicts B + B supports A). Trace all consumers of causal_edges relation IN (supports,contradicts) for hang/loop/contradictory-result or mutual-exclusivity assumptions. Re-confirm F-A3-02 dryRun default.
noveltyJustification: Refinement of existing F-A3-01 (not a brand-new finding): settled severity via downstream-consumer trace. Weighted refinement P2 (0.5x of 1) over weighted total = small; per rule, refinement-only iteration with one refined P2 and no new P0 => modest ratio; reported as 0.5 reflecting one refined P2 carrying the deepen verdict. No new P0/P1; F-A3-01 CONFIRMED at P2 (does not rise), F-A3-02 re-confirmed.

findingDetails.title: F-A3-01 CONFIRMED at P2 — reciprocal-contradictory pairs are benign across all causal_edges consumers; strongest reaction is a benign 'mixed' trust decision + a 'review for consistency' hint
findingDetails.evidence: Every downstream consumer treats supports/contradicts as INDEPENDENT rows, not a mutually-exclusive pair. trust-tree.ts:67 hasContradiction=.some(relation==='contradicts') is an O(n) presence test (no loop); flips decideTrust to 'mixed' (196) + causalSignal 'stale' (138) while ALSO counting the coexisting supports edge (139,203) -> 'mixed trust' is the correct response to coexisting signals, not a logic error. causal-graph.ts:727-729 emits benign advisory hint only. Recursive walkers are bounded: causal-boost CTE by hop_distance<? (462) + origin-return filter (463) + UNION dedup; getCausalChain by depth>=maxDepth (617) + visited path-Set (630). No hang, no loop, no contradictory result.
findingDetails.recommendation: Hold at P2. Real remediation (reciprocal/transitive reconciliation of the directional model) is whole-graph + out of a9e9bdb0a5^..HEAD range. Live blast radius further narrowed: memory_context/memory_search do not feed causal edges into trust-tree today (see integrationEvidence).
findingDetails.scopeProof: materializing collector NEW in range (relation-backfill.ts 100% new; opt-in wiring causal-graph.ts:274,960 new); all traced consumers PRE-EXISTING (trust-tree.ts, causal-boost.ts, causal-edges.ts unchanged in range) and confirmed to absorb the new pair gracefully
affectedSurfaceHints: trust-tree.buildTrustTree (memory_context/memory_search trust display — currently unfed causal edges, see edge case 3)

claimAdjudication.claim: Reciprocal-contradictory pairs cause NO consumer to hang, loop, or return a logically-contradictory result; strongest reaction is benign 'mixed' trust + 'review for consistency' hint. F-A3-01 stays P2.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched all production code for mutual-exclusivity/XOR/'cannot both' on supports+contradicts: only hit is contradiction-detection.ts:34 (pre-existing DIRECTIONAL model, per-(source,target), never reads reverse edge -> reciprocal pair invisible, not mishandled). Searched both recursive causal_edges walkers for missing termination guards: both bounded. Verified trust-tree is NOT fed causal edges at live memory_context/memory_search sites (dormant in production).
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Could argue 'mixed'/'stale' is a contradictory RESULT; rejected because reporting both coexisting signals as 'mixed trust' is correct, not a logic error.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Already at floor; not-a-finding only if contradicts collector were permanently disabled, but it is a doubly-gated user-reachable opt-in (dryRun:false AND contradicts:true).

traceabilityChecks: F-A3-02 dryRun default RE-CONFIRMED: relation-backfill.ts:355 const dryRun = options.dryRun !== false (default TRUE; only explicit false writes); contradicts collector doubly-gated via options.contradicts === true (364, default OFF). Non-inverting.

Consumer trace complete: {trust-tree.ts, causal-boost.ts, causal-edges.ts getCausalChain, causal-graph.ts memory_drift_why, relation-coverage.ts} — each inspected, none hangs/loops/asserts exclusivity downstream.
Recursive-walk termination REFUTED as DoS: causal-boost CTE 462-463 depth+origin guards; getCausalChain 617,630 depth+visited-set guards.
Only mutual-exclusivity assertion is contradiction-detection.ts:34 (pre-existing directional model = the SOURCE of the F-A3-01 gap, not a downstream victim).
integrationEvidence: handlers/memory-context.ts:1832-1843 (memory_context MCP tool) wires trustTreeInput with responsePolicy+codeGraph only, NO causal: key -> buildTrustTree gets empty causal edges -> contradiction logic dormant live
handlers/memory-search.ts:1229-1234 (memory_search MCP tool) wires trustTreeInput responsePolicy only, NO causal: key -> same dormancy

lib/search/search-decision-envelope.ts:81 invokes buildTrustTree only when trustTreeInput supplied; only stress_test/search-quality/w3-trust-tree.vitest.ts feeds causal edges -> live trust-tree reciprocal-pair interaction is currently THEORETICAL
handlers/causal-graph.ts:960 memory_causal_stats({backfill:{...,contradicts}}) is the sole production enabler of the contradicts collector
edgeCases: causal-boost recursive CTE under reciprocal pair VERIFIED BOUNDED (depth bound 462 + origin-return 463 + UNION dedup; MAX(walk_score) aggregation 465)
getCausalChain JS recursion under reciprocal pair VERIFIED BOUNDED (visited path Set 630 + depth>=maxDepth 617)
trust-tree NOT fed causal edges at live memory_context/memory_search call sites -> live blast radius narrower than worst case (wired-but-unfed)
relation-coverage contradicts minimumShare=0 minimumCount=0 (44) -> opt-in growth cannot trip coverage failure or assume exclusivity vs supports (0.05, 43)

iteration-number ambiguity: shared state.jsonl has 2 type:iteration lines (strict-serial=3) vs dispatch parallel=18; honored dispatch=18 per parallel-safety, no shared-state write; iteration-014.md present without iter-014.jsonl = concurrent agent mid-flush
confirmedClean: trust-tree contradiction handling (trust-tree.ts:67,135-139,196,201-207) presence-based O(n), independent supports/contradicts counts, benign 'mixed'
causal-boost recursive CTE (causal-boost.ts:430-469) depth+origin+UNION bounded; contradicts 0.8x / supports 1.0x independent
getEdgesFrom/getEdgesTo (causal-edges.ts:525-573) no relation filter, no per-pair dedup, no exclusivity
memory_drift_why buckets+hint (causal-graph.ts:285-287,727-729) independent buckets, benign advisory
dryRun+opt-in double-gate (relation-backfill.ts:355,363-364) default TRUE/OFF — F-A3-02 re-confirmed
relation-coverage targets (relation-coverage.ts:43-44) no exclusivity, no contradicts-demand
ruledOut: Downstream DoS/infinite loop from reciprocal/cyclic supports/contradicts edges — REFUTED: both recursive walkers depth- and cycle-bounded (causal-boost 462-463; getCausalChain 617,630)

A consumer assuming mutual exclusivity and returning a logically-contradictory result — REFUTED: sole exclusivity assertion (contradiction-detection.ts:34) is directional/per-pair and never reads the reverse edge; trust-tree 'mixed' is correct not contradictory
F-A3-01 rising to P1/P0 — REJECTED: impact benign across all consumers; live trust-tree unfed today; materializing path doubly-gated opt-in (default OFF)
dryRun default inversion (F-A3-02 regression) — REFUTED again: relation-backfill.ts:355 non-inverting; opt-in collectors default OFF (363-364)
focusTrack: F-A3-01 severity adjudication via downstream-consumer trace + F-A3-02 re-confirm
selfCheck: Compact skeptic/referee on whether F-A3-01 should RISE: hunted the DoS path (recursive walkers) and the mutual-exclusivity-break path (every relation-bucketing consumer); both refuted with file:line. Referee verdict: HOLD at P2 — no consumer hangs/loops or assumes exclusivity; strongest reaction (trust 'mixed' + advisory hint) is benign and arguably correct. No P0/P1 asserted.
